title: Nenthukitten Lyrics Star
stanzas: <div>Nenthukitten Song Lyrics Star

Nenthukitten nenthukitten
nei vilakka yaethi vachchen
unnoda kannathil
muththam kodukka

neththi kadan theekkalana
kochikumae saami ellaam
pakkathil nee vaadi
alli kodukka.

poona pola veettukulla
vandhuviduven
punnagaiyil nee sindhum
paala kudippen

vandhidaatha sathampotu
kaththipuduven
kannathil thaezha pola
koththividuven

Roja poo iduppula
vandu pola suththi vandhu
suththi vandhu
thaena eduppen.

ooru sanam aththanaiyum
kootti vandhu unnudaiya
kallathanam kaattipuduven

aasa dhosa ye hey ye hey
nee pesum bashaiye
puriyalaiye..(2)

veppaam thanipatharkku
velanjirukkum vellariye vellariye
kazhuthu valaivil
ennai sariya vittu
thalluriye thalluriye

kadhal bodhai un kaiyyil
maattikittu muzhikkurene
ippa maamaa

ponnu ilamansa puliyam
pazham pola uzhukka
paakkaatha aamaa

saaral adikkuthadi
adi un azhagu sokka panapola
kitta nee vaadi
konjam kulirkaay venum.

aasa dhosa ye hey ye hey
nee pesum bashaiye
puriyalaiye..(2)

koondhal aruviyena
sarivugalil kottuthadi
kottuthadi.

kanna kuliyil manam
parisalai pol
suthuthadi suthuthadi
suthuthadi.

kurumbu pechchaala
kokku thalamela
vennai vaikkaatha maamaa

mookku sevakkaatha
mundhiri pazham enna
naakku sevakka vaikkalaamaa

ilama pasikkuthadi..
rusi kaattiputtu
ilai poatuputtu
thanni thelichuputtu
kaakka vaikkuriye yaemaa!!

Nenthukitten nenthukitten
nei vilakka yaethi vachchen
unnoda kannathil
muththam kodukka

neththi kadan theekkalana
kochikumae saami ellaam
pakkathil nee vaadi
alli kodukka.

poona pola veettukulla
vandhuviduven
punnagaiyil nee sindhum
paala kudippen

vandhidaatha sathampotu
kaththipuduven
kannathil thaezha pola
koththividuven

Roja poo iduppula
vandu pola suththi vandhu
suththi vandhu
thaena eduppen.

ooru sanam aththanaiyum
kootti vandhu unnudaiya
kallathanam kaattipuduven

aasa dhosa ye hey ye hey
nee pesum bashaiye
puriyalaiye..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Nenthukitten?

The song Nenthukitten expresses deep feelings of love and affection, capturing the essence of romantic longing.

What is the plot context of the movie Star?

The movie Star revolves around themes of love and relationships, making this song a perfect fit for its narrative.

Who is the singer of Nenthukitten?

The song is sung by the talented Karthik, known for his melodious voice and emotional delivery.

Who wrote the lyrics for the song?

The lyrics for Nenthukitten were penned by Palani Bharathi, who is known for his poetic expressions in Tamil cinema.

When was the song released?

The song was released on July 17, 2001, and has since become a beloved classic.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Star, the song Nenthukitten serves as a poignant expression of love and yearning. It beautifully conveys the emotions of longing and affection, making it a perfect backdrop for romantic moments. The soothing melody, combined with Karthik's heartfelt vocals, evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This track resonates with anyone who has ever experienced the bliss of love, making it a timeless piece in Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nenthukitten from the Star movie is a heartwarming melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Karthik's soulful voice and Palani Bharathi's evocative lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance. Dive into this enchanting track that beautifully blends emotion and melody, making it a timeless favorite.
stanzaMeanings: I have placed a lamp in your eyes to give you a kiss.
Oh God, is it a small thing to give you everything?
I will come home like a flower and sing with a smile, giving you milk.
When I arrive, I will hold you tightly like a treasure in my eyes.
Like a rose flower, I will come around and take the honey.
I will gather all the love and show you your beauty.
Your language of desire is not understood by me.. (2)
The hot sun will shine on the lonely path, and I will be thrown away from the right path.
The love in your hands is overwhelming, I am feeling it now, uncle.
Like a young mango, you are sweet and not to be ignored, right?
Your beauty is like a storm, I need a little coolness from you.
Your language of desire is not understood by me.. (2)
The curls are like a river flowing, flowing.
In the eyes, the heart flows like a river, flowing, flowing, flowing.
Don't put butter on the drum of sweet talk, uncle.
Can I not taste the fruit of the grape that doesn't have a stem?
I am feeling hungry.. showing off the taste, putting leaves and making it wet, can I not eat it?!!
I have placed a lamp in your eyes to give you a kiss.
Oh God, is it a small thing to give you everything?
I will come home like a flower and sing with a smile, giving you milk.
When I arrive, I will hold you tightly like a treasure in my eyes.
Like a rose flower, I will come around and take the honey.
I will gather all the love and show you your beauty.
Your language of desire is not understood by me.. (2)
